title: sorbus × floribunda
intro: Sorbus × floribunda, also known as the hybrid whitebeam or floribunda whitebeam, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Sorbus aucuparia and Sorbus torminalis. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Sorbus × floribunda include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
